fields.name: name
fields.description: A human-readable identifier for the context window.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A textual explanation of the context window's purpose.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current operational state of the component.

fields.name: tokenCount
fields.description: The number of tokens currently in use.

fields.name: maxTokens
fields.description: The maximum number of tokens allowed.

fields.name: usage
fields.description: Represents the current usage of the context window.

fields.name: lastCompactedAt
fields.description: Timestamp of the last compaction event.

fields.name: current
fields.description: The current value of a numerical measurement.

fields.name: max
fields.description: The maximum allowable value for this context.

fields.name: threshold
fields.description: The point at which an action is triggered.

fields.name: message
fields.description: The text content of the message.

fields.name: notificationType
fields.description: Indicates the type of notification generated.
